description: Retail / hospitality / e-commerce. PCI scope drives much of the posture; point-of-sale (POS) and payment gear are dominant patch-lag contributors.

citations.safe_score: IBM Cost of a Data Breach 2025 retail section + PCI SSC State of PCI Compliance 2024.
citations.open_critical: NVD CVE distribution against typical retail stack (Cisco, Aruba, Verifone, Ingenico, Square). KEV catalog filtered to retail-targeting CVEs.
citations.open_high: Same NVD/KEV intersection at HIGH severity.
citations.mfa_coverage_pct: Microsoft Digital Defense Report 2025 + PCI DSS v4.0 requirement 8.4 (effective March 2025).
citations.patch_lag_days: Qualys TruRisk 2025 retail + Verizon Payment Security Report 2025.
citations.nhi_growth_rate_pct: CyberArk 2025; retail NHI growth driven by omnichannel API expansion.
